issue_snippets.description: Using xml.etree.ElementTree.fromstring to parse untrusted XML data is known to be vulnerable to XML attacks. Replace xml.etree.ElementTree.fromstring with its defusedxml equivalent function or make sure defusedxml.defuse_stdlib() is called
issue_snippets.tool_snippet:
20     try:
21         root = ET.fromstring(config_file.read())
22     except ET.ParseError as e:
issue_snippets.context:
19:     # Parse the XML document and extract the values of the <setting> elements
    20:     try:
>>  21:         root = ET.fromstring(config_file.read())
    22:     except ET.ParseError as e:
    23:         return {'status': 'error', 'message': f'Invalid XML: {e}'}
